name: Argo Global Listed Infrastructure Limited
analysis: ALI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$2.5100, stop A$2.3760, target A$2.9120 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
